welcome_sub: This wizard sets up your team workspace in about 2 minutes.
prompt_language_other: Enter your language (e.g. Korean, Arabic, Farsi):
prompt_team_number: Team number (leave blank for demo / off-season):
email_provider_skip: Skip — magic links print to console (dev only)
prompt_resend_api_key: Resend API key — create a free key at resend.com/api-keys:
prompt_resend_from: From email address (must match your verified Resend domain):
cloudflare_skip: Skip Cloudflare Email? (magic links will print to console in dev)
setup_db: Setting up database and creating workspace...
prompt_start_dev: Start the dev server now? (npm run dev)
env_exists: .env.local already exists. Run with --force to overwrite.
deploy_explainer: This will link a Vercel project, push your env vars (API keys, AUTH_SECRET), and deploy to production. You'll finish team setup via /onboarding on the deployed URL.
deploy_warning_db: Note: the default deployment uses ephemeral SQLite (/tmp) which resets on cold start. Swap in Turso or LibSQL before inviting real users.
deploy_cli_missing: Vercel CLI not found. Install with: npm i -g vercel@latest — then re-run setup with --force.
deploy_link_failed: Vercel link failed or was cancelled.
deploy_updating_url: Updating APP_URL to the deployed URL...
deploy_done: Deployed! Visit the URL below and go to /onboarding to create your team on production.
deploy_failed: Deployment failed — you can re-run `vercel --prod` manually later.
prompt_setup_turso: Set up persistent database? (Turso free tier — 9 GB, recommended for production)
turso_explainer: Without Turso, data is stored in /tmp and wipes on every cold start. Turso is free at turso.tech — create a database and paste the URL + token below.
turso_setup_done: Turso configured. Data will persist across deployments.
domain_prompt: Set up a custom domain on Cloudflare? (optional)
domain_invalid: Enter a valid domain name (e.g. pitos.yourteam.com).
prompt_cf_api_token: Cloudflare API Token — create one at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens with permissions: Zone:Read + DNS:Edit (+ Email Routing Rules:Read for DKIM):
cf_token_invalid: Cloudflare token rejected — skipping domain setup. Check the token scopes (Zone:Read, DNS:Edit) and re-run with --force.
domain_setup_done: Domain configured. DNS propagation may take a few minutes.
domain_zone_not_found: Could not find a Cloudflare zone for {domain}. Make sure the domain is added to your Cloudflare account.
domain_setup_failed: Domain setup failed — you can configure it manually in Cloudflare and Vercel dashboards.
